description: A fan with a disability needs to purchase tickets in an accessible seating area.

nodes.task_description: Identify the fan's needs (e.g., wheelchair accessible seating).

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands the specific seating requirement.

nodes.task_description: Check the availability of accessible seating for the desired game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds available wheelchair accessible seats.

nodes.task_description: Process the sale of the accessible seats and provide information about accessible entrances and amenities at the stadium.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the sale and provides helpful information to the fan.
